programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier

programme.title: Submission

OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - [24 Bottles] Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest Red Dates & Wolfberry + Bird's Nest Chinese Ginseng
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird’s Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos TCMF-501 0.5L Mug with Strainer & Handle
programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 26
programme.desc: Puan Ida stumbles upon Zara’s diary and begins reading it, uncovering long-buried truths. Meanwhile, Riqmal and Kathy get engaged, with Alisya presenting the ring.

programme.desc: Ramadan becomes more meaningful through the spirit of compassion and sharing. In episode 9, SEMBANG highlights the inspiration for charitable giving by business owner Halim Samdin and its benefits to the community. HIDANG features Chef Syed Shah with Bubur Lambuk, a traditional recipe that is a Ramadan must-have. GAYA shares smart, budget-friendly tips for transforming the style of the dining space.

programme.desc: Farouk breaks into Azizi’s house to destroy CCTV footage linking him to Budi’s fall. When he awakens from his coma, Budi pretends to have memory loss. As Farouk’s debtors close in, his desperation to get money from Azizi intensifies.

Said leaves home as he thinks he is the main reason why the family is torn apart. He hopes that after he is gone, they can all make peace with one another.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 9
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

This series is not only exciting and suspenseful but also highly informative and educational.

programme.title: Thayangaathey - EP 11
programme.desc: Thayangaathey, is a health documentary-drama, that is centred around 13 unique case studies who suffer from chronic, life-altering diseases. The cases range from poor lifestyle choices, complacency, ignorance to complete unfortunate personals. The intent of the programme is to educate viewers of these illnesses, the symptoms to look out for, the probability of them succumbing to these illnesses, early detection and so on.
